description_long: This is a medium-sized cardboard shipping box, commonly used for parcel delivery in urban environments. The front face features a United States Postal Service Priority Mail label with 'Tracked Insured' and USPS branding, indicating it is intended for domestic shipping. One side of the box has handwritten text reading 'Yo: John', suggesting it is addressed to a recipient named John. The top and other sides of the box are plain, with subtle corrugation lines and some faint marks, typical of cardboard packaging. The box appears to be sealed with tape along the top seam, ensuring its contents are secure during transit. The overall appearance is that of a standard, slightly worn, but intact shipping parcel.
description: A medium cardboard USPS Priority Mail shipping box with a label, handwritten note, and taped top seam. The box shows typical wear and is ready for delivery.
description_view_0: The front view displays a USPS Priority Mail label with 'Tracked Insured' and postal branding.
description_view_1: The top view shows the taped seam and plain cardboard surface with no markings.
description_view_2: This side view features handwritten text reading 'Yo: John' in black marker.
description_view_3: The opposite side is plain with faint marks and no distinct labels or writing.
